title: euphrasia rostkoviana subsp. hirtella
intro: Euphrasia rostkoviana subsp. hirtella is a subspecies of the Euphrasia genus, commonly known as the eye bright or hirtellous euphrasia. It is a perennial plant found in alpine and subalpine regions, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Euphrasia rostkoviana subsp. hirtella is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the eyes, as well as support overall eye health and vision. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, offering potential benefits such as improved eye comfort, reduced eye strain, and enhanced vision clarity.
